interventions.name: F1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: representation-matching routines that require one mechanics situation to be explained across words, graphs, and equations

interventions.name: F1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: model-selection tasks comparing force, energy, and momentum explanations for the same event

interventions.name: F1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: collision and motion analyses that bound when momentum reasoning is justified

interventions.name: F1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: graph-to-measurement checks tying symbolic work back to observed motion
